# Introduction
Welcome to AI for Educators: Supply Chain Optimization with Base Track: Sovereign RAG (No-Code). This lab manual guides you through setting up a basic supply chain management system using No-Code tools and NotebookLM.

## Goal
Link Google Drive folders directly to NotebookLM for instant domain knowledge management and policy updates, facilitating efficient domain-specific research in AI for Educators.

## Step-by-Step Guide
1. Create a dedicated Google Drive folder for Supply Chain policies, manuals, and datasets.
2. In NotebookLM, click **Add Source** -> **Google Drive**.
3. Select your designated folder. NotebookLM will now automatically sync and ground its answers based on the continually updated files within that folder.

---
# Limit context window

# Business Value
The supply chain optimization system enables educators to streamline their research process by linking relevant Google Drive folders directly to NotebookLM, facilitating efficient domain-specific knowledge management. This reduces manual data entry and improves overall productivity, ultimately contributing to more effective educational outcomes.
